# Ajay Sachdev — Full Profile
> Finance & Operations Manager at a B2B SaaS scale-up. CIMA part-qualified. Builds AI systems, Power BI dashboards, and financial models. Python, SQL, FAISS, RAG. Based in the UK.

## Background
Ajay Sachdev grew up in a Sindhi family from Mumbai. His dad ran a textile business (P. Ashok Kumar, est. 1988). After studying Financial Markets at Jai Hind College (2015-18) and earning a Chartered Wealth Management certification from AAFM, he worked in the family business — leading a vertical integration into garment manufacturing and building a direct-to-consumer website (uni-nation.in).

He moved to the UK for an MSc in Finance at Loughborough University (2020-21, 2:1), then joined a B2B SaaS scale-up as an intern in October 2021. He is now the sole finance & operations function, managing three entities across the UK, US, and Pakistan.

He is currently pursuing CIMA qualification (expected May 2026) and serves as a School Governor at a 250-pupil primary school.

## Current Role — Finance & Operations Manager
- Sole finance & operations function across UK, US, Pakistan (3 entities)
- Supported £5M+ in seed and Series A fundraising
- Built 50+ Power BI dashboards as sole data analyst
- Manages 7 multi-currency bank accounts (GBP, USD, PKR)
- Produces management accounts, VAT returns, payroll
- Drafts contracts, NDAs, SoWs, supplier agreements
- Board-level reporting and investor decks
- Reduced WiFi costs 50%, electricity 74%, software 30%+
- Saves 40+ hours/month through automation

## Projects

### Ajay Brain — Agentic AI System
An internal AI assistant built with Python that connects to Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, Xero, HubSpot, and more. It processes natural language queries to retrieve company information, generate reports, and automate workflows.
- 9,000 lines of Python
- 15 API integrations
- 6,124 documents indexed
- 100% search accuracy on test suite
- Uses FAISS vector search, BM25 keyword search, RAG pipeline
- PII detection and redaction built in
- Claude and GPT-4o as reasoning engines

### Trading Bot — Algorithmic FTSE 100 Trading
An algorithmic trading system for FTSE 100 stocks, built with Python. Uses technical indicators, sentiment analysis, and a Claude-powered risk auditor to make trading decisions.
- 20 FTSE 100 tickers tracked
- Zero leverage policy
- Claude-powered risk auditor reviews every trade
- Automated position sizing and risk management
- Paper trading with real-time market data

### Uni-Nation (uni-nation.in)
Website for the family textile business. Built and maintained by Ajay.

## Skills & Tools

### Finance & Modelling
Financial Modelling, Management Accounts, VAT & Payroll, Budgeting & Forecasting, Cash Management, Multi-entity consolidation, Seed & Series A fundraising support, Board-level reporting, Investor decks, Scenario analysis

### Data & Analytics
Power BI (50+ dashboards), SQL, GA4, Firebase, Python data analysis

### Systems & Automation
Xero, HubSpot, Factorial, Rydoo, Onboarding/offboarding, ESOPs

### AI & Engineering
Python, GPT-4o, Claude, FAISS, BM25, RAG, PII detection, API integrations

### Commercial & Legal
Contract drafting, NDAs, SoWs, Cost negotiation, Supplier agreements

## Education
- MSc Finance, Loughborough University (2020-21, 2:1)
- B.Com (Financial Markets), Jai Hind College, Mumbai (2015-18)
- CIMA part-qualified (expected May 2026)
- Chartered Wealth Management (AAFM)
